entries.title: Heart Attack Symptoms
entries.text_content: [URGENT MEDICAL EMERGENCY] These symptoms may indicate a heart attack. DO NOT wait. Call 108 for an ambulance immediately or go directly to the nearest major hospital like SMHS or SKIMS. Do not rely on home remedies.

entries.title: Stroke Symptoms
entries.text_content: [URGENT MEDICAL EMERGENCY] These symptoms strongly indicate a stroke. Time is critical. Call 108 for an ambulance immediately. The faster you reach the hospital (like SKIMS Soura), the better the chances of recovery.

entries.title: Severe Breathing Issues
entries.text_content: [URGENT MEDICAL EMERGENCY] Severe difficulty breathing is life-threatening. Seek immediate emergency medical care at the nearest hospital or call 108.

entries.title: High Fever (Prolonged)
entries.text_content: [DOCTOR VISIT REQUIRED] A high fever that doesn't respond to Paracetamol or lasts more than 3 days requires a doctor's diagnosis to check for infections like Typhoid or severe pneumonia. Please visit a local clinic.

entries.title: Severe Abdominal Pain
entries.text_content: [DOCTOR VISIT REQUIRED] Sudden, severe, or unbearable stomach pain could indicate appendicitis or a gallbladder issue. Please do not take strong painkillers without a diagnosis. Go to a hospital emergency room.
